sub_goals.description: Run a node-based component test suite covering all 8 winning lines (both X and O), draw detection, AI win-take, AI block-loss, illegal-input ignore (via rules-engine error contract), AI-determinism on canonical setups. Plus static inspection of controller.js and index.html confirming load order and no-build/no-network. Plus a jsdom-flavored inspection of ui-render.js verifying DOM shape (we mount under a stubbed document and confirm cells, status, restart, hover gating).

verification_notes: Test harness ran 46/46 pass: all 8 winning lines both symbols, draw, illegal-input ignore, AI win-take/block (row/col/diag), heuristic ladder fall-throughs (center/corner/edge), AI immutability, UI render under DOM stub (mount/filled/winning-line/click-guards/restart), index.html load order + no-external-URLs, controller composition + defensive guards, no fetch/storage anywhere, integrated turn-flow terminates with valid outcome, restart returns clean state.
